{{Infobox character
| name = Baldesar Kern
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Dawn and Darkness (novel)|Of Dawn and Darkness]]
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Baldesar Kern]] is scheduled for a meeting with [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Baldesar Kern]] is loyal and stable.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c18">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Baldesar Kern]] is the Head of the [[Champion]]'s [[Guild]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c22">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
